titleZh: 新公司法对大资管机构公司治理的影响初探
titleEn: A Preliminary Look at the Impact of the New Company Law on the Corporate Governance of Large Asset-Management Institutions
abstractZh: 聚焦资管机构治理场景，分析关联交易、忠实义务、审计委员会和治理架构调整等规则在金融机构中的适配问题。
abstractEn: Analyzes how the revised Company Law affects governance design for asset-management institutions, including related-party controls, fiduciary obligations, and audit-committee arrangements.
